summary: Validated admin users + documents module expansion on public preview URL with backend pytest and frontend Playwright. All requested CRUD and regression shell/chatbot checks passed end-to-end using real admin auth/session.
action_items: No blocking defects found in requested scope; proceed to next admin parity module.
Optional hardening: guard document inline metadata onBlur patch flow against stale value overwrite when category and description are edited sequentially.
critical_code_review_comments: Potential consistency risk in DocumentsManager: each onBlur PATCH uses one current input plus one value from the rendered document object; sequential edits can race and reapply stale values depending on timing.
Testability remains strong for new modules due consistent data-testid coverage on users/documents/admin shell components.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted transient TEST users/documents during CRUD tests (no residual test data expected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used: https://greeters-ssr.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth credentials from request worked. Verified: /admin, /admin/users, /admin/documents, /admin/chatbot; API CRUD for /api/admin/users and /api/admin/documents including multipart upload.
rca of the issue: No reproducible functional failures in this run.
